title: CreateTweaker
body:
CreateTweaker is an Addon for CraftTweaker and Create adding CraftTweaker support for Create Machines.

The documentation can be found here

If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via **[![Patreon logo](https://i.imgur.com/CAJuExT.png) Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/jaredlll08)**. [![Nodecraft sponsor banner](https://assets.blamejared.com/nodecraft/jared.jpg)](https://nodecraft.com/r/jared) **This project is sponsored by Nodecraft. Use code [JARED](https://nodecraft.com/r/jared) for 30% off your first month of service!**
